name: mundo-cubiertas
description: Sistema digital integral para Mundo Cubiertas

scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently --names BACK,FRONT --prefix-colors green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup:docker: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
